title: 10 best herbal tinctures for jaw clenching
description: English lavender tinctures helps with jaw clenching because of its calming and relaxing properties. The herb's essential oils, particularly linalool and linalyl acetate, work to reduce muscle tension and stress in the face and neck, which can contribute to jaw clenching and bruxism. As a natural anxiolytic, lavender tincture helps to soothe anxiety and promote relaxation, allowing individuals to release physical tension and relax their jaw muscles, thereby reducing the frequency and se...
